items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, including one critical RCE vulnerability
items.summary: Amasty released a security update for 25 Magento extensions, with one critical vulnerability allowing remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (PHP object injection leading to RCE)
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection flaw in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront page. CISA has added this actively exploited vulnerability to its KEV catalog.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: An Incorrect Authorization vulnerability allows low-privileged attackers to bypass security features and gain unauthorized view access to data without user interaction. This is addressed in APSB26-05.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update addresses multiple critical vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security mechanisms, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, and compromise store data.
